Darwin (a16z speedrun)

Nano, Omni, Seed, Fal

Content

Role

I led social content direction for Darwin with an emphasis on consistent narrative across high-frequency posting surfaces.

The objective was to make the multiplayer AI thesis legible in short-form creative without losing depth.

Motion Boards

Workflow

The workflow uses reusable creative blocks to keep brand consistency while enabling rapid topic and format variation.

Each social piece is designed to stand alone and also compound as part of a broader narrative arc.

Production and distribution are tuned per platform for readability, retention, and message carry-through.
